task: Create a comprehensive business plan for a SaaS startup providing AI-powered code review tools. Cover: 1) Market analysis with competitor research, 2) Technical architecture, 3) 3-year financial projections, 4) Go-to-market strategy, 5) Risk assessment. Tag the report with the current UTC time.

agents.name: TimekeeperAgent
agents.description: Stamps the report with a UTC timestamp
agents.instructions: Call TimePlugin once and return the timestamp.

agents.name: MarketResearchAgent
agents.instructions: Analyze market opportunities, identify competitors, assess market size and trends. Provide data-driven insights with sources.

agents.name: TechnicalArchitectAgent
agents.instructions: Design scalable, secure technical architectures. Cover cloud infrastructure, microservices, databases, APIs, security. Include diagrams and specifications.

agents.name: FinancialAnalystAgent
agents.instructions: Build revenue forecasts, cost structures, cash flow analysis, break-even calculations. Use realistic assumptions and provide sensitivity analysis.

agents.name: MarketingStrategistAgent
agents.instructions: Develop GTM strategy: customer acquisition channels, pricing, brand positioning, growth tactics. Focus on B2B SaaS best practices.

agents.name: RiskAnalystAgent
agents.instructions: Identify technical, market, financial, operational, and legal risks. Propose mitigation strategies with probability and impact.

agents.name: BusinessWriterAgent
agents.instructions: Synthesize all sources into a cohesive, executive-level business plan. Use clear language and proper formatting.

settings._note: Magentic dynamically picks agents per round. Plugins/tools on agents are documented but Magentic in current version does not bridge them to SK Kernel (warning logged).
